title: BEM-926 protocol record
objective:
Create file governance/reports/BEM926_FINAL_WORKING_SYSTEM_PROTOCOL_V4.md with content # BEM-926 FINAL WORKING SYSTEM PROTOCOL V4
Status: DRAFT_FOR_OPERATOR_REVIEW_AFTER_DEEP_REWORK
Date: 2026-05-31
Purpose: corrected full-system protocol after operator rejected BEM-925 for treating objects as if they had prompts and for insufficient detail.
Key corrections:
- Objects General Director, Director and Worker are not LLM agents and do not have prompts.
- Objects have passports, rules, functions, channels, curators, internal contours, reports and Definition of Done.
- Prompts exist only for LLM-executed roles/providers and operational handlers.
- Language is Russian-first; English terms only as technical identifiers.
- Roadmap is detailed into substeps, not vague phases.
- Explicitly includes creation/implementation of General Director, Director and Worker as repository objects: passports, registry refs, channels, curators, contours and tests.
- Preserves yesterday's accepted decisions: workspace belongs to internal contour; no local individual element rules by default; vertical links are curator-to-curator; internal contour algorithm is Curator -> Analyst -> Auditor -> Executor -> Auditor with revision through Analyst; horizontal links are Auditor A -> Analyst B; provider model primary GPT Analyst + Claude Auditor + Claude Executor with GPT-Codex/Codex fallback for Claude roles.
- Claude's 13 requirements are mapped to roadmap steps and release blockers.
Document contents:
- Corrected mistakes table.
- Definition of working system.
- Current state fact/partial/missing table.
- Object passports and object creation requirements.
- Elements and contours.
- Detailed link mechanics.
- Provider model and failover.
- Operator fronts and real repository mechanisms.
- Telegram/ChatGPT channels.
- Rule inheritance and prompt model.
- Prompt pack only for LLM roles/providers/handlers.
- SSOT registries.
- Detailed roadmap substeps 1.1..8.2.
- Claude requirements mapping.
- Operator gates and Definition of Done.
Local operator artifacts:
- BEM926_final_working_system_protocol_v4_ru.docx
- BEM926_final_working_system_protocol_v4_ru.zip
QA: DOCX rendered to 9 pages; no edge clipping detected.
No issue comments.
